reviews.review_description: Yea it’s fun it will but it’s been like 2 years like it doesn’t take that long but cool game

I love this game and I cannot wait for it to fully come out. Although, the only thing I wish they'd do is update how to npcs look. Cuz to be honest, they're kinda chopped 😅. I understand the game isn't out yet, but i hope they work on this in the future. Other than that, BEAUTIFUL game!
It was a very fun demo. I really enjoyed myself.
Wonderful game, not much I have to say besides what's the music and endless mode
When can I buy it

Opinion: great game with much potential 
fact: a little buggy at times and very difficult to find cds, and megaphone parts

reviews.review_title: PLEASE BRING ON THE FULL GAME PLEASE
reviews.review_description: LUV THIS DEMO GAME A LOT PLEASE GIVE US THE FULL GAME THANKS A BUNCH IN ADVANCE GOD BLESS🙏🏾

I am a massive fan of Border Patrol shows on TV... and this game scratches that itch SO WELL! 
Because it's the demo only ( I wrote the developers pleading for them to finish the game ) there are a few learning curves when it comes to controls. The only two major glitches that I found frustrating were: not being able to find the different parts to assemble additional equipment / always failing the photo ID task because it would say the person didn't look a thing like their passport ID when they absolutely did. 
Regardless - I keep playing the demo because I enjoy it so much!
this is great

I love this game. A bit glitchy, but has potential. The breakroom is a bit annoying. Hard to grab and open things. If you find you're stuck when you have a customer, take a peek on the side of the desk where they enter and place the passport. Sometimes you think you've sent the passport up and out, but it falls in between the wall and desk. Another tip for developer, maybe keep the political stuff more chill.
Absolutely loved the demo. Cannot wait for the full game.

reviews.review_title: When is the game coming out
reviews.review_description: I really like this demo but I want to know when the game comes out because I had the game for a while and they had not released a new game
Loved the demo and will buy the game but pls add option to remove snap turn because my controller won’t let me stand still
I really loved this trial, I must say there could be a few changes otherwise I really look forward to the full game
I love this game so much! But you need a bigger boundary for this, so it's not amazing if you're in a cramped space. So that's why it's a 4. Anyway, it's a very good game!
Really love it!! Can’t wait to get the full version.

reviews.review_title: This game is so good but
reviews.review_description: It’s kind of hard to figure out what you’re doing
Everything is difficult. Difficult to grab things, difficult to use them. Most of the times I couldn’t even finish with the first passenger since I was unable to give him his passport back.

reviews.review_title: I love this game, and it has potential
reviews.review_description:
Really good and fun game 
Here are something’s I love to see for the full realese

.being a free game
.having online multiplayer to play with friends 
.more animations for the characters 
.instead of the point and walk system, being able to move freely 
.A bribing system for the people that pass and carry ilegal stuff
.your boss not being always alowed to see you
.more rooms, customization for airport, and a system to to steal stuff from the people without getting in trouble or anyone noticing 

I think this game has so much potential 😄

The demo already shows so much potential! I love the mix of story line they've incorporated, you get a story while also not drowning out the actual gameplay. The amount of interactive features they have, with more being added is just great, great, great! If this is just the demo, I can totally see this becoming a perfect example/new standard for a proper simulation/immersive experience on Quest!
This was unexpectedly fun!!!! Please bring the full version out!!!!

reviews.review_title: Can’t wait for the full release
reviews.review_description: Had so much fun with the demo and am SO HAPPY to see the full version is in the works.
Sometimes the passenger stands at the end just waiting with no further instructions or interaction.  Its so annoying having to reset the game. Is it a glitch?

This game is one of the best PSA/customs officers games I have ever played and I can't wait for the real game there are only 2 things I wish could be added 
1: ability to deny them of thumbs down them at passport scanning 
2: endless mode
Other than that keep going and keep shining devs your awesome 
Ps:it would be awesome If the main game could be free

Best game in terms of feeling, but I wish I could move by hand.
More freely

reviews.review_title: Can’t wait for the full game!
reviews.review_description:
Update:
Really really sad to found out, that this game will never come :(( the developer stopped it and there will be an other one with Aliens. 
Really hope, he will change his mind and bring both games! 


I love these kind of games like „papers please“ on PC. Playing it in VR is even better and it makes so much fun. Can’t wait for the full game!
each time i get in the game the boundaries are messed up even resetting it’s not working

After completing the tutorial I was stuck in the loading screen for 20 minuets before I decided to play something else, please fix this, I can't play past the tutorial, also the game constantly thinks I'm taller than I actually am.
It never told me which countries are bad and why I should deny certain people and it’s really frustrating
I am glitched on tutorial and cant go further
I was loading into the game and it told me to grab the paper at the beginning ￼but it would let me🤷🏽‍♀️
so fun it’s so enjoyable i would be playing for ages

I enjoyed the experience a lot. 

But the end of the shift is a bit strange. You are waiting a lot to start a new shift.

Other than that GREAT
Plz make more on demo or release full this game is sooo fun and the secrets I found the trophy

This game is very cool and i REALLY cant wait for the full release

note to devs: can you PLEASE PLEAAASE give me early access 🥺🥺🙏🙏
Can’t wait for full game release and I hope it’s free bc I’m kinda broke so plz release it soon! 😄🥳
This is great need to try im exited for the full game

Though a demo it was really good, fun and an enjoyment to play. It wasn’t confusing and simple. 

Maybe a con is how long the days were because it could have been longer but obviously there’s other ways like progress and stuff.
I waiting release
I cant wait for the full release, the game is very understandable and its very fun
